topPick.name: Western Digital
topPick.thesis: Western Digital (WDC) is trading at 39.6x P/E, broadly in line with sector peers at 38.6x; RSI at 60 reflects healthy bullish momentum without overextension. Three-month price momentum of +147.1% reflects exceptional institutional accumulation, with EPS growing +483% year-on-year, underpinned by a bullish MACD crossover confirming upward price pressure. Composite score of 77/100 places WDC in the top 1% of S&P 500 constituents across all four analytical strategies, outperforming its sector by +107.7% over the past quarter.
